subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter of the fifteenth of Dhi'l-Hijjah hath arrived. Praise be to God, it beareth testimony to the well-being of the divine friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه پانزدهم ذی الحجه رسید الحمد لله دلیل بر سلامت یاران الهی
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @chastisement and requital, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @relationship between government and people
